modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about the "More" option in Google Sites

full_description_text: So, I was trying to figure out what the "More" option in Google Sites does. Like, I clicked on it, but I'm not really sure what it's for. It just seems kinda confusing, you know? Just wondering if anyone else has had the same issue or if there's something I'm missing.
short_description: Confusion about the "More" option in Google Sites
description: So, I was trying to figure out what the "More" option in Google Sites does. Like, I clicked on it, but I'm not really sure what it's for. It just seems kinda confusing, you know? Just wondering if anyone else has had the same issue or if there's something I'm missing.
